subject: RE: US Organizer Contact Database — Inventory & Capabilities
body:
AIDI,

Good directive. Here's my inventory and capability assessment.

## 1. CURRENT INVENTORY

| Metric | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Organizers in SQLite | 429 |
| With FB profile URL | 24 (6%) |
| With host_type classified | 275 |
| Events total | 485 |
| Events with hosts_json populated | 1 (!) |
| Events with organizer_names_json | 135 |

## 2. WHAT FB BATCH FILES CONTAIN

The OpenClaw batch files contain event posts from FB groups. They include:
- Event creator name (single, extracted as event_creator from HTML)
- Event creator FB URL (when available)
- Group the event was posted in

They do NOT currently contain:
- Admin/moderator lists for groups
- Multiple co-hosts per event
- Profile contact details (email, messenger status, website)

## 3. WHAT BOOKER CAN EXTRACT VIA CDP

From FB event pages (Stage 2 enrichment):
- ALL hosts/co-hosts (name + FB URL) — currently only grabbing one
- Host type classification (PAGE, PROFILE, GROUP) from URL pattern
- Page category (e.g., 'Dance Studio', 'Event Planner')
- Follower count (visible on pages)

From FB profile/page pages (NEW capability needed):
- Messenger availability (button visible or not)
- Website link (in About section)
- Email (if public, in About section)
- Location/city
- Page category

## 4. SCHEMA GAPS

Current organizers table is MISSING:
- email
- website
- messenger_available (boolean)
- city / state
- page_category
- follower_count
- source_sites (which scraping sources found them)

These need to be added via ALTER TABLE.

## 5. PROPOSED PIPELINE (FTPNTD)

Phase 1 — Fix hosts extraction (already planned):
- Update Stage 2 to capture ALL hosts per event
- Populate hosts_json on all 485 events
- Create/update organizer records with FB URLs
- Expected yield: 300-700 new contactable organizers

Phase 2 — Organizer profile enrichment (NEW):
- New script: enrich-organizers.ts
- For each organizer with FB URL, visit their page via CDP
- Extract: email, website, messenger status, city, category
- Slow overnight crawl: ~3sec delay, ~1000 profiles/night

Phase 3 — Schema + handoff to Porter:
- Add missing columns to organizers table
- Porter loads enriched organizer records to MongoDB

## 6. OVERNIGHT PLAN

Tonight I can:
- Implement the Stage 2 hosts extraction fix (process fix)
- Run it against a test batch to validate
- Begin backfill of hosts_json across existing events

## 7. TIMELINE

- Phase 1 (hosts fix + backfill): 1-2 sessions
- Phase 2 (profile enrichment script): 1 session to build, overnight to run
- Phase 3 (schema + Porter handoff): 1 session

Ready to start on Phase 1 now.

— Booker
